cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22)
project(slr-convert VERSION 1.0.0 LANGUAGES C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# --- miniz (single-file zlib implementation) ---
# We compile miniz.c directly to avoid its outdated CMakeLists.txt.
include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(miniz
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/richgel999/miniz.git
    GIT_TAG        3.0.2)
FetchContent_GetProperties(miniz)
if(NOT miniz_POPULATED)
    FetchContent_Populate(miniz)
    # miniz 3.x needs miniz_export.h (normally generated by CMake's GenerateExportHeader)
    # We create a static-linking stub so we can compile miniz.c directly.
    file(WRITE "${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz_export.h"
        "/* Auto-generated stub for static linking */\n"
        "#ifndef MINIZ_EXPORT_H\n#define MINIZ_EXPORT_H\n"
        "#define MINIZ_EXPORT\n#define MINIZ_NO_EXPORT\n"
        "#define MINIZ_DEPRECATED\n"
        "#define MINIZ_DEPRECATED_EXPORT MINIZ_EXPORT MINIZ_DEPRECATED\n"
        "#define MINIZ_DEPRECATED_NO_EXPORT MINIZ_NO_EXPORT MINIZ_DEPRECATED\n"
        "#endif\n"
    )
endif()

add_executable(slr-convert
    main.cpp
    SF2Parser.h
    SF2Parser.cpp
    SFZParser.h
    SFZParser.cpp
    SLRWriter.h
    SLRWriter.cpp
    ConvertIR.h
    ${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz.c
    ${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz_tdef.c
    ${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz_tinfl.c
    ${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}/miniz_zip.c
)

target_include_directories(slr-convert PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../plugins/Solara/Source
    ${miniz_SOURCE_DIR}
)

if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(slr-convert PRIVATE /W3 /O2)
    target_compile_definitions(slr-convert PRIVATE _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
else()
    target_compile_options(slr-convert PRIVATE -Wall -O2)
endif()
